summary: Iteration 8 — Auth & RBAC testing. 17/17 backend pytest cases passed; all critical frontend auth flows verified via Playwright. Unauth /api/* returns 401, seed admin login works and returns role=admin, wrong password returns 401, bogus Google session_id returns 400, /api/auth/me gated correctly, activity logs record authed /api/kpis calls, admin CRUD on users works (create viewer -> login -> promote -> cannot demote self -> delete), viewer blocked from /api/admin/users (403), logout invalidates bearer token. Frontend: unauth visit redirects to /login, login-page + google-signin-btn visible with both whitelist domains listed, password login with seed admin works, user-menu-btn shows 'Vivo Admin / admin', user menu exposes Users + Activity Logs + Sign out which route to /admin/users (users-page), /admin/activity-logs (activity-logs-page), and /login respectively.

testid_naming_drift.issue: Review request spec names the dropdown links 'menu-users-link' and 'menu-activity-logs-link', but the actual implementation uses 'menu-users' and 'menu-logs'. Flow works end-to-end; only a naming convention / spec-vs-impl mismatch that future test scripts must be aware of.

action_items: Optional: rename Sidebar UserMenu dropdown testids from 'menu-users' -> 'menu-users-link' and 'menu-logs' -> 'menu-activity-logs-link' to match the review-request spec, OR update the spec. Either is fine; functionality is unaffected.
critical_code_review_comments: auth.py cleanly separates auth_router (public-ish) and admin_router (require_admin), and the api_router on server.py applies Depends(get_current_user) at router level — correct pattern.
ActivityLogMiddleware correctly skips /api/auth/* and anonymous requests, and logs path/method/status_code/duration — verified via /api/admin/activity-logs query.
Bcrypt is used via passlib; seed admin upserts only when absent (idempotent). user_sessions has a TTL index (expireAfterSeconds) so expired sessions self-clean.
get_current_user accepts both httpOnly cookie and Authorization: Bearer (axios interceptor path) — verified.
Self-demotion and self-disable are blocked at PATCH /api/admin/users/{id} — verified.
Google callback enforces ALLOWED_EMAIL_DOMAINS and auto-provisions first-time users as viewers — logic is correct (E2E with real Google is out-of-scope for automation, as noted).
Logout deletes the session token from db AND clears cookie; subsequent calls with same bearer correctly return 401 — verified.
Code-review note: server.py is 1279 lines — consider splitting analytics endpoints into a dedicated router module for maintainability (carried over from iter 7).

Code-review note: /app/backend/auth.py hard-codes EMERGENT_SESSION_URL and SESSION_TTL_DAYS — fine for now but could live in a config section; DB name falls back to 'vivo_bi' while backend/.env uses DB_NAME='test_database' (works because env override wins, but the fallback mismatch is a minor footgun).

success_rate.frontend: 100% of testable auth flows (Google E2E not automatable; button visibility + domains listed verified)

seed_data_creation: Each test run creates an ephemeral viewer user test_viewer_<uuid>@vivofashiongroup.com which is deleted by test_cleanup_delete_user.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Auth is fully functional. Dropdown testids in Sidebar UserMenu are 'menu-users' and 'menu-logs' (NOT '-link' suffix as the spec called for). /admin/users page has testid 'users-page' and /admin/activity-logs has 'activity-logs-page'. Seed admin is idempotent on startup. For bearer-token API tests, hit /api/auth/login with JSON {email,password}, read .token, then set Authorization: Bearer <token>. Activity logs middleware skips /api/auth/* so don't try to find login calls in /api/admin/activity-logs. The bogus Google callback returns 400 (not 401) because it's an upstream httpx.HTTPError wrap.
rca of the issue: No bugs found in iteration 8 auth work.
